terms.definition: Governed container for institutional work with traceability to strategy
Major stage within a large mission
Grouped work within a phase
Smallest operational work unit; always belongs to a mission
Repeatable verification step within a mission
Computed operational status: healthy, watch, at_risk, critical
Recorded proof of execution
Governed record of mission decisions and rationale
Post-mission institutional knowledge capture
Reusable operational plan for recurring efforts
Relationship between missions affecting schedule
Leadership notification for blocked or at-risk missions
Governed criteria required before mission completion
Upward link from mission to vision and purpose
Human accountable for mission delivery
Leadership sponsor with escalation visibility
AI advisory analysis without autonomous state changes
Mission output linked to institutional memory
Integrated timeline of tasks, milestones, and reviews
People, equipment, budget assigned to mission
